prompt:
A comparison sheet showing a comet’s position against fixed stars across multiple nights, with layered pencil points, short tail sketches, and alignment marks suggesting motion over time. A simple star atlas and pencil nearby make it clearly an astronomy tracking artifact.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft low field lighting, realistic paper and graphite texture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the sheet centered and uncluttered.
